input-trace.description: Live throttle, brake, and clutch inputs.

relative.description: Gaps to cars ahead and behind you.

track-map.description: Dynamic 2D map of the current circuit.

relative-map.description: Progress bar of car track positions.

led-flags.description: LED matrix display of track flags.

flat-flags.description: Banner-style list of active track flags.

delta.description: Live delta HUD — one glance, am I faster or slower?

g-meter.description: Lateral and longitudinal G-force friction circle.

sector-matrix.description: Sector-by-sector timing with progress bar, live delta per sector, LAST and BEST.

lap-log.description: Last 8 laps with time and delta vs personal best. Best lap highlighted.

engine-panel.description: Liquid temperatures, pressures, and system adjustments (ABS, TC, Brake Bias, Engine Map).

rpm-lights.description: Standalone shift-light LED bar driven by engine RPM, with pit-limiter animations. Split out from the Speed widget so the rev lights never distort the speedometer layout.

race-dash.description: Combined cockpit cluster: a gear ring with an RPM arc and printed shift zone, dominant speed readout with lap/position/RPM, a coach tab with reference speed, plus a pit-lane mode with limiter assist. Replaces the former Speed, RPM Lights, and Driving Coach widgets.

chassis.suspensionAndBrakesDesc: Show tire pressures, temperatures, and brake bias panels.

referenceDesc.personalBest: Your best clean lap this session.
referenceDesc.personalOptimal: Your theoretical best — fastest sector from each of your laps combined.
referenceDesc.sessionBest: Fastest lap set by any driver in the current session.
referenceDesc.sessionOptimal: Theoretical best — fastest sector from any driver in the session combined.
referenceDesc.sessionLast: Last fully completed lap by any driver in the session.

enginePanel.horizontalLayoutDesc: Align cells horizontally in a single row instead of a vertical grid.
enginePanel.horizontalColumnsDesc: Number of columns for the horizontal layout (3, 4, or Max).
enginePanel.verticalColumnsDesc: Number of columns for the vertical layout (1 to 4).

flagDisplay.alwaysShowDesc: Show widget even when no flag is active.
flagDisplay.holdDurationDesc: How long to keep the flag visible after it clears.
flagDisplay.forceSingleLedDesc: Show a single large indicator instead of the LED matrix.
flagDisplay.splitDisplayDesc: Split matrix into left & right parts to place around mirror.
flagDisplay.animateLedsDesc: Enable dynamic scrolling and waving patterns for flags.

inputTrace.throttleDesc: Show throttle trace on the graph.
inputTrace.brakeDesc: Show brake trace on the graph.
inputTrace.absActiveDesc: Color of the brake trace/bar when ABS is active.
inputTrace.clutchDesc: Show clutch trace on the graph.
inputTrace.steeringWheelDesc: Show steering wheel block and graph trace.
inputTrace.centerDisplayDesc: What to show in the center of the steering wheel.
inputTrace.traceGraphDesc: Show the scrolling input history graph.

radar.autoDesc: Auto: hidden during lone qualifying (single car on track)

raceDash.colorizeDigitsDesc: Tint the gear digit and RPM number with the zone color at high revs.
raceDash.coachSectionDesc: Show the brake/gas call and best-lap reference speed.
raceDash.pitLaneAssistDesc: Transform into the pit panel when entering the pit lane.
raceDash.pitSpeedOverrideDesc: Leave 0 to auto-detect from session data.
raceDash.nearLimitWarningDesc: Color speed amber when this many {{unit}} below the pit speed limit.

relative.rowHeightDesc: Vertical padding of each driver row.
relative.playerRowColorDesc: Highlight color for your own row.
relative.playerNumberColorDesc: Color of your position and car number.
relative.licenseBadgeDesc: Driver safety rating badge (A, B, C, D, R).
relative.pitIndicatorDesc: Show icon when driver is in pits.
relative.abbreviateNamesDesc: Use short names to save space.
relative.driverFlagsDesc: Show active warning flags next to driver name.

sectorMatrix.showSectorTimesDesc: Display per-sector timing grid. Disable for a compact view with just the progress bar and lap times.
sectorMatrix.showPredictedLapDesc: Estimated finish time displayed in the header.

standings.positionChangeDesc: Arrow showing positions gained or lost since session start.
standings.brandLogoDesc: Manufacturer badge next to driver name.
standings.tireCompoundDesc: Visual indicator of current tire type.
standings.licenseBadgeDesc: Driver safety rating badge (A, B, C, D, R).
standings.iRatingDeltaDesc: Projected iRating gain or loss based on current position.
standings.lapsCompletedDesc: Number of laps completed by each driver.
standings.abbreviateNamesDesc: Shorten names to save column space.
standings.driverFlagsDesc: Display active warning flags (e.g. Mechanical Damage/Meatball) next to driver name.
standings.columnHeadersDesc: Show labels above each data column.
standings.sessionProgressInfoDesc: Laps or time remaining bar at the top.
standings.liveWeatherInfoDesc: Wind and temperature row in the header.
standings.sofDesc: Average iRating of all registered drivers.
standings.pitStopCounterDesc: Number of pit stops made by the player car.
standings.incidentsBadgeDesc: Incident count accumulated by the player car.
standings.totalDriversCountDesc: Total number of drivers in the session.

timer.showSessionTypeDesc: Display the current session type (Race, Qualify, Practice).
timer.showLapCountDesc: Display current lap and total laps.
timer.showSimDateDesc: Display in-simulator date (may differ from real date).

trackMap.playerDotColorDesc: Ping ring and label pill color for your car.
trackMap.showYouLabelDesc: Display the label above your car dot.

weather.windCompassDesc: Animated compass showing current wind direction.
weather.airTemperatureDesc: Ambient air temperature at track level.
weather.trackTemperatureDesc: Surface temperature of the racing surface.
weather.windSpeedAndDirDesc: Numerical wind speed and cardinal direction.
weather.weatherForecastDesc: Upcoming weather changes during the session.
weather.trackWetnessStateDesc: Current track surface wetness level (Dry, Damp, Wet, Flooded).
